content: Cash out value = algorithm-driven from live win probability, discounted by house margin (typically 10-30% below fair value): CashOutValue ~= PotentialPayout x CurrentWinProbability - HouseMargin. Corroborated across multiple sportsbook sources (Betfair, FanDuel, bet365, William Hill, Bovada): partial cash out lets a bettor withdraw part of the stake early while the remainder stays live at odds prevailing at the time of the partial cash out. Minimum partial cash out amount is commonly enforced (must meet/exceed platform's minimum stake). Cash out is suspended near settlement / during high-volatility moments (scoring plays, reviews, rapid odds movement) to prevent the bettor exploiting stale pricing. Free-bet-funded wagers often have cash out withheld until value exceeds the free bet amount.
